languages.text: {n}На отправившихся служить в дозоре смотрели как на ходячих мертвецов. Все знали, что если ксеносы атакуют вновь — эти лица окажутся растянуты на металлических костях. И когда кто-то крикнул им вслед девиз меровского, несколько глоток ответили: "Нет, искупление для многих!"{/n}

{n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На отправившихся служить в дозоре смотрели как на ходячих мертвецов. Все знали, что если ксеносы атакуют вновь — эти лица окажутся растянуты на металлических костях. И когда кто-то крикнул им вслед девиз меровского, несколько глоток ответили: "Нет, искупление для многих!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

{n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, freedom for the many!"{/n}

{n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, freedom for the many!"{/n}

{n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

languages.text: {n}警戒に赴く者たちは、すでに死んでいるような存在と見なされていた。もし異星人が再び襲ってきたら、彼らの顔は金属骨に張り付くだろう。そして、彼らが去る背中にメローヴィアンのモットーが叫ばれると、数人の声で「いいえ、多くの人々の自由だ！」と返事が返ってきた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, freedom for the many!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}警戒に赴く者たちは、すでに死んでいるような存在と見なされていた。もし異星人が再び襲ってきたら、彼らの顔は金属骨に張り付くだろう。そして、彼らが去る背中にメローヴィアンのモットーが叫ばれると、数人の声で「いいえ、多くの人々の自由だ！」と返事が返ってきた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Quienes partieron para servir en la guardia pasaron a ser considerados una especie de muertos en vida. Todo el mundo sabía que si los xenos volvían a atacar, esas caras estarían estiradas, cubriendo una osamenta metálica. Cuando alguien les gritó el lema meroviano mientras partían, unas pocas voces respondieron «No, ¡expiación para el grupo!».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Quienes partieron para servir en la guardia pasaron a ser considerados una especie de muertos en vida. Todo el mundo sabía que si los xenos volvían a atacar, esas caras estarían estiradas, cubriendo una osamenta metálica. Cuando alguien les gritó el lema meroviano mientras partían, unas pocas voces respondieron «No, ¡expiación para el grupo!».{/n}

languages.text: {n}在旁人眼中，那些被派往监视哨站服役的，早已是必死之人。所有人都明白，如果异形再次来袭，眼前这些面孔就会第一个被撕下来，覆盖在敌人的金属骨架上。可每当有人对着他们远去的背影，高呼梅罗夫格言时，依然会有几声回应传来：“为了众人之赎！”{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在旁人眼中，那些被派往监视哨站服役的，早已是必死之人。所有人都明白，如果异形再次来袭，眼前这些面孔就会第一个被撕下来，覆盖在敌人的金属骨架上。可每当有人对着他们远去的背影，高呼梅罗夫格言时，依然会有几声回应传来：“为了众人之赎！”{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die für die Wache abkommandierten Soldaten galten als lebende Tote. Alle wussten, dass ihre Gesichter im Falle eines neuerlichen Angriffs der Xenos über metallene Knochen gespannt würden. Und als ihnen jemand das Motto der Merovianer hinterher rief, erwiderten einige Stimmen 'Keine Sühne für die Vielen'!{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die für die Wache abkommandierten Soldaten galten als lebende Tote. Alle wussten, dass ihre Gesichter im Falle eines neuerlichen Angriffs der Xenos über metallene Knochen gespannt würden. Und als ihnen jemand das Motto der Merovianer hinterher rief, erwiderten einige Stimmen 'Keine Sühne für die Vielen'!{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nöbete gidenlere yürüyen ölüler gözüyle bakılıyordu. Herkes biliyordu ki zenolar tekrar saldırırsa o yüzler, metal kemiklerin üzerine gerilecekti. Gidenlerin ardından biri Merov şiarını haykırdığında birkaç ses karşılık verdi: "Hayır, çoğunluğa kefaret!"{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nöbete gidenlere yürüyen ölüler gözüyle bakılıyordu. Herkes biliyordu ki zenolar tekrar saldırırsa o yüzler, metal kemiklerin üzerine gerilecekti. Gidenlerin ardından biri Merov şiarını haykırdığında birkaç ses karşılık verdi: "Hayır, çoğunluğa kefaret!"{/n}

languages.text: {n}À leur départ, les futures sentinelles furent considérées par tous comme des morts en sursis. Personne n'ignorait que, si les xénos revenaient, les visages de ces hommes finiraient étirés sur des os métalliques. Quand, alors qu'ils s'éloignaient, quelqu'un proclama la devise merovienne, quelques voix répondirent : « Non ! Expiation pour tous ! »{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Those who had set off to serve on the watch were looked upon as the walking dead. Everyone knew that if the xenos attacked again, those faces would be stretched out over metal bones. And when someone shouted the Merovian motto at their departing backs, a few voices called back, "No, atonement for the many!"{/n}
